cross_scene_arcs.title: Path to Guardianship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack progresses from discovering his frost abilities and invisibility to being chosen as a Guardian, rejecting the role, accepting his identity after recalling his past, and officially joining the team.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Confused and purposeless with new frost powers, unaware of why he exists.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Officially sworn in as a Guardian, accepted by the team.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Pitch
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack attacks Pitch in rage after Sandy's corruption, is overpowered and trapped with his staff destroyed, but later escapes by finding his center of fun and leading a counter-escape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Directly retaliating against Pitch with a powerful burst of ice.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Escapes Pitch's trap and continues the fight with renewed purpose.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The broader battle with Pitch is not yet resolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Memory Recovery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack learns his childhood memories are stored in teeth stolen by Pitch and later recalls saving his sister, which helps him accept his Guardian identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Unaware of his life before becoming Jack Frost.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Recovers a key memory of saving his sister, reinforcing his sense of self.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Full memories are not yet retrieved, but a crucial piece is remembered.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Jamie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack convinces Jamie of his existence by frosting his window and later cooperates with Jamie to escape Pitch, solidifying their relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jamie is skeptical or unaware of Jack's reality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jamie fully believes in Jack and they work together.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Shadow
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: North discovers Pitch's threat to the Globe, activates emergency protocols, confirms Pitch's return, accuses Jack of betrayal during the Easter attack, but later reconciles with Jack to protect Jamie in the final confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Unaware of the threat's nature to the Globe.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reunited with Jack and focused on protecting Jamie without powers.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to defeat Pitch and ensure children's safety without powers.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bringing Jack into the Fold
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: North accepts Jack as a new Guardian, attempts a ceremonial induction, mentors him on personal centers, negotiates for his help with tooth collection, faces conflict over Jack's allegiance, reconciles during the crisis, and finally administers the oath to make Jack an official Guardian.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Accepting Jack Frost as the new Guardian chosen by the Man in the Moon.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jack Frost is officially a Guardian, as declared by North.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Leading the Guardians to Victory
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: North commands the sleigh launch to Tooth Palace, proposes and plans the tooth collection mission to restore belief, mourns Sandy's passing with fellow Guardians, and ultimately sees the Globe lit with yellow lights indicating children's belief.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Alerted and preparing for action against the threat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Globe of Believing Children shows many believing children, indicating mission success.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Campaign to Spread Fear and Challenge Guardians
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pitch corrupts dreams into Nightmares, challenges the Moon, taunts the Guardians, attacks Sandy, and disrupts Christmas production to build fear and weaken belief.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Beginning to corrupt dreams and deploy Nightmares.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Disrupted North Pole operations but facing continued Guardian resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Guardians remain active and children's belief persists despite disruptions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Manipulation and Conflict with Jack Frost
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pitch psychologically manipulates Jack by exploiting his insecurities and offering memories, then physically attacks him, breaking his staff and trapping him in a chasm.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Confronting Jack in his sanctum to break his spirit.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jack trapped and powerless with his staff destroyed.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jack's fate and potential recovery from the trap.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Downfall and Imprisonment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pitch's power declines as belief resists, his Nightmare sand is neutralized by children, he is physically overpowered by Guardians, ignored by fearless children, and finally imprisoned by his own Nightmares.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Anticipating the extinction of all belief in the Guardians.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Imprisoned underground after being overwhelmed by his own Nightmares.
